# @nifrajs/prompt — LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand — run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

Type-safe prompts — bind an instruction to input/output Standard Schemas and get validated, typed LLM results from any provider.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

## Key exports

- **prompt** _(function)_ — `prompt: (instruction: string) => Prompt<undefined, string>`
- **PromptInputError** _(class)_ — `class PromptInputError`
- **PromptOutputError** _(class)_ — `class PromptOutputError`
- **Prompt** _(interface)_ — `interface Prompt<Input, Output>`
- **PromptMessage** _(interface)_ — `interface PromptMessage`
- **PromptRequest** _(interface)_ — `interface PromptRequest`
- **PromptResponseFormat** _(interface)_ — `interface PromptResponseFormat`
- **RunOptions** _(interface)_ — `interface RunOptions`

## Footguns

- No package-specific footguns beyond the framework conventions. See [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) and [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) for the full contract.
